## etude log

Show a chronological timeline of runs and retros

```
etude log [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                  help for log
      --kind stringArray      include only this event kind (run|retro); repeatable
      --limit int             cap to most-recent N events after sort (0 = unlimited)
      --subject stringArray   include only events whose subject set contains this id; repeatable
```
